fields.name: Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor to which the standard purchase code is assigned.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a standard purchase code from the Standard Purchase Code table.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the standard purchase code.

fields.name: Insert Rec. Lines On Quotes
fields.tooltip: Specifies how you want to use standard purchase codes on purchase quotes.

fields.name: Insert Rec. Lines On Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies how you want to use standard purchase codes on purchase orders.

fields.name: Insert Rec. Lines On Invoices
fields.tooltip: Specifies how you want to use standard purchase codes on purchase invoices.

fields.name: Insert Rec. Lines On Cr. Memos
fields.tooltip: Specifies how you want to use standard purchase codes on purchase credit memos.
